english_script: Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 19 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English. Today I read about AI agents on the Hugging Face website. The article explained what an agent is. It used a simple story. The story is about a helper named Alfred. Alfred is an agent. He gets a command like make coffee. He first understands the request. Then he makes a plan. He goes to the kitchen. He uses the coffee machine. He brews the coffee. He brings it back. That's all an agent does. It uses an AI model to think and plan. Then it uses tools to act. The article said an agent has two parts. The brain is the AI model. It does the thinking. The body is the tools. It does the actions. The article also talked about different AI models. Most agents use LLMs. LLMs are large language models. They take text in and put text out. Examples are GPT-4 and Llama. But LLMs only generate text. They cannot do other things alone. So agents need extra tools. For example, a chat app can make pictures. That is because it has a tool for that. The article showed a code example. An agent can send an email. You give it a tool to send messages. Then it can do that task. I learned that agents can do many tasks. It depends on the tools we give them. This is interesting for my work. I make AI products. Understanding agents helps me design better features. The article made it clear. Agents are not magic. They just combine thinking with acting. That is the key idea. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation: 大家好，我是Lulu。英语日常练习第19天。我坚持说话来提高英语口语。今天我读了一篇关于AI智能体的文章，来自Hugging Face网站。文章用一个简单的故事解释了什么是智能体。故事是关于一个叫Alfred的助手。Alfred是一个智能体。他收到一个命令，比如煮咖啡。他首先理解请求。然后他制定计划。他去厨房。他用咖啡机。他煮好咖啡。他端回来。这就是智能体做的事情。它用AI模型来思考和计划。然后它用工具来行动。文章说智能体有两个部分。大脑是AI模型。它负责思考。身体是工具。它负责行动。文章还谈到了不同的AI模型。大多数智能体使用LLM。LLM是大型语言模型。它们输入文本并输出文本。例如GPT-4和Llama。但LLM只能生成文本。它们不能单独做其他事情。所以智能体需要额外的工具。例如，聊天应用可以生成图片。这是因为它有相应的工具。文章展示了一个代码示例。智能体可以发送邮件。你给它一个发送消息的工具。然后它就能完成那个任务。我学到了智能体可以做很多任务。这取决于我们给它们的工具。这对我工作很有趣。我设计AI产品。理解智能体帮助我设计更好的功能。文章说得很清楚。智能体不是魔法。它们只是把思考和行动结合起来。这是关键点。谢谢聆听，明天见。
concise_english: Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 19 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English. Today I learned about AI agents from Hugging Face. An agent is like a helper named Alfred. He gets a command, makes a plan, and uses tools to act. For example, to make coffee, he uses a coffee machine. An agent has a brain and a body. The brain is the AI model. It thinks and plans. The body is the tools. It does actions. Most agents use LLMs like GPT-4. LLMs only generate text. So agents need extra tools to do tasks like sending emails. The key idea is that agents combine reasoning with action. This is useful for my work in AI products. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
concise_chinese: 大家好，我是Lulu。英语日常练习第19天。我坚持说话来提高英语口语。今天我学习了关于AI智能体的知识，来自Hugging Face。智能体就像一个叫Alfred的助手。他收到命令，制定计划，并使用工具来行动。例如，要煮咖啡，他使用咖啡机。智能体有大脑和身体。大脑是AI模型，负责思考和计划。身体是工具，负责行动。大多数智能体使用像GPT-4这样的LLM。LLM只能生成文本。所以智能体需要额外的工具来完成像发邮件这样的任务。关键点是智能体将推理与行动结合起来。这对我做AI产品的工作很有用。谢谢聆听，明天见。
